properties.body:
[Gulf of Finland] FINNISH NAV WARN 372/26
NORTHERN BALTIC
UNDERWATER DIVING OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS BY SEVERAL WORKING VESSELS IN VICINITY OF 59-26.0N 021-04.5E.
SEVERAL MARKER BUOYS ARE ANCHORED IN THE AREA. MARINERS ARE REQUESTED TO KEEP SHARP LOOKOUT AND MINIMUM DISTANCE OF 1.4 NM FROM THE AREA.
